notes: Heavy Armor shape variants. 46 blocks — every shape exists in two grid sizes (small-grid 0.5 m / 1.25 m / 0.25 m, and large-grid 2.5 m). All share the same profile: PCU 1, built from Heavy-Duty Plate only, unlocked by default. Mass, health, and heavy-duty-plate quantity scale with size class and shape volume. The 'Half Corner' shape is the sole exception on the small-grid side, sitting at 0.25 m / 1.25 m instead of 0.5 m / 2.5 m. Light armor variants live in blocks/armor-light.json. `armorShape` matches the light-armor values so consumers can join light↔heavy variants across tiers. Mass values are pulled from the wiki's raw Info Block template source (more precise than the infobox-rendered values) and rounded to 2 decimals.

resources.displayName: Heavy Armor Corner 0.5 m
resources.description: Reinforced armor shape to provide extra protection. Considerably stronger but also heavier than light armor.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
